design_philosophy: A high-end, dark-mode portfolio for an AI-Automation Builder. It blends aggressive technical precision (monospaced metadata, terminal-like grids) with elegant editorial touches (glassmorphic panels, spring-easing micro-interactions, and premium typography). Content is structured using Problem-Solution-Impact narratives to prove value.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

hero.structure: Asymmetric split. Left: Large typography (H1) mixed with italicized editorial serif highlights, role subtitle in mono, 3 CTAs. Right: B&W portrait with subtle emerald glow behind it.
hero.ctas: Primary: Solid Emerald background, black text. Secondary/Resume: Glassmorphic with border. Contact: Text link with animated underline.

projects_card.style: Glassmorphic panel (bg-neutral-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5). Dynamic border lighting on hover (Aceternity style tracing beam or radial gradient mask).
projects_card.content: Problem/Solution/Impact framework. Hidden/collapsed by default, expands in-place using Framer Motion layout animations. Tech stack shown as mono chips.

experience_timeline.style: Vertical line (border-l border-white/10). Nodes are glowing Emerald dots. Roles and dates in Fira Code.

navigation.style: Floating pill nav at the top (z-50). backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border border-white/10. Links have spring-easing hover states.

custom_cursor.style: Framer Motion elastic tracking dot (bg-emerald-500) with a larger trailing hollow circle (border-emerald-500/50). Blends with difference mode on text.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased border opacity and emerald glow shadow.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for the premium feel.

visual_enhancers.lighting: Subtle radial gradient blobs (bg-emerald-500/10 blur-3xl) placed behind the hero photo and projects grid to create depth without overwhelming the dark theme.

hero_portrait.description: Black and white portrait of Dhruv in a blazer. Use in hero section.
hero_portrait.treatment: Clip to a rounded rectangle or capsule, add a subtle dark overlay at the bottom if text overlaps.

abstract_textures.description: Black textile texture. Can be used for deep background noise.
Abstract light streaks. Can be used as a blurred background element or card overlay.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-muted (#525252) is only used for non-essential decorative text. Use text-secondary (#A3A3A3) for readable body text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals, layout animations (especially the Problem/Solution/Impact card expansions), and the custom elastic cursor.
Implement lucide-react for standard icons, but utilize @phosphor-icons/react if you need a more distinct/technical weight.
In Tailwind config, define the custom colors precisely: background '#050505', surface '#0a0a0a', emerald-500 '#10b981'.
Build the contact form using Shadcn UI form components and prepare the handler for Resend email delivery.
Do NOT use pure white (#ffffff) for text; stick to neutral-50 (#fafafa) to reduce eye strain on dark backgrounds.
Include a global CSS class for the noise texture and apply it via a fixed div with pointer-events-none.
Mix the Cabinet Grotesk font with Cormorant Garamond for specific italicized highlight words in headings to achieve the requested 'Editorial Serif + Tech Forward' fusion.
